qa_pairs.question: What should I do before contacting support?
qa_pairs.answer: Before writing to support, you should check the system status page (status.computecanada.ca) to see if the problem you're experiencing has already been reported.

qa_pairs.question: When should I send an email to support?
qa_pairs.answer: You should send an email to support if you can't find the information you need on our wiki.

qa_pairs.question: Why is it important to have my email address registered in my account when contacting support?
qa_pairs.answer: It is important because our ticketing system will be able to recognize you automatically.

qa_pairs.question: Where should my email address be registered before I contact support?
qa_pairs.answer: Your email address should be registered in your account at ccdb.computecanada.ca/email.

qa_pairs.question: How can I receive faster and more accurate assistance from support staff?
qa_pairs.answer: A well-written question or problem description will likely result in faster and more accurate assistance from our staff.

qa_pairs.question: Why should I avoid vague subject lines like 'Something is wrong' in my support emails?
qa_pairs.answer: An email titled 'Something is wrong' or 'Nothing works' will take a long time to resolve because support will have to ask you to provide missing information.

qa_pairs.question: What information should I include in the subject line of my support email?
qa_pairs.answer: In the subject line of the email, include the system/cluster name and a few words of what may be wrong, for example, 'Job 123456 fails to run on the Rorqual cluster'.

qa_pairs.question: What is an example of a good subject line for a support email?
qa_pairs.answer: An example of a good subject line is 'Job 123456 fails to run on the Rorqual cluster'.

qa_pairs.question: Should I use an old email thread to ask for help on a new topic?
qa_pairs.answer: No, you should not request help on a different topic as a follow-up to an old email thread. Instead, start a brand new one to avoid re-opening an old ticket.

qa_pairs.question: Which email address should I use for questions about accounts?
qa_pairs.answer: For questions about accounts, email accounts@tech.alliancecan.ca.

qa_pairs.question: What is the email address for questions about account renewals?
qa_pairs.answer: For questions about account renewals, email renewals@tech.alliancecan.ca.

qa_pairs.question: Who should I contact for questions regarding Globus file transfer services?
qa_pairs.answer: For questions about Globus file transfer services, email globus@tech.alliancecan.ca.

qa_pairs.question: Which email address is for questions about using Cloud resources?
qa_pairs.answer: For questions about using Cloud resources, email cloud@tech.alliancecan.ca.

qa_pairs.question: What is the email address for inquiries about the Resource Allocation Competition (RAC)?
qa_pairs.answer: For questions about the Resource Allocation Competition (RAC), email allocations@tech.alliancecan.ca.

qa_pairs.question: Which email address should I use for questions or issues specific to the Trillium cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: For questions or issues regarding the Trillium cluster specifically, email trillium@tech.alliancecan.ca.

qa_pairs.question: What is the general support email address for any other question or issue?
qa_pairs.answer: For any other question or issue, email support@tech.alliancecan.ca.

qa_pairs.question: What information is required in a support request to help support staff assist me better?
qa_pairs.answer: You should include the Cluster name, Job ID, Job submission script, File or files which contain the error message(s), Commands that you were executing, Software (name and version) you were trying to use, and when the problem happened.

qa_pairs.question: Is the cluster name required in a support request?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, the cluster name is required in your support request.

qa_pairs.question: Should I include the Job ID in my support request?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, you should include the Job ID in your support request.

qa_pairs.question: How can I provide my job submission script in a support request?
qa_pairs.answer: You can either give the full path of the script on the cluster, copy and paste the script, or attach the script file.

qa_pairs.question: What are the acceptable ways to provide error messages in a support request?
qa_pairs.answer: You can give the full path of the file(s) which contain the error message(s), copy and paste the file(s), or attach the error message(s) file(s).

qa_pairs.question: Should I include the commands I was executing in my support request?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, you should include the commands that you were executing.

qa_pairs.question: Should I send screenshots or large image attachments with my support request?
qa_pairs.answer: You should avoid sending screenshots or other large image attachments except when necessary, as the plain text of your commands, job script, etc., is usually more helpful.

qa_pairs.question: What details about software should I include in my support request?
qa_pairs.answer: You should include the name and version of the software you were trying to use.

qa_pairs.question: Is it important to specify when the problem happened in my support request?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, you should specify when the problem happened.

qa_pairs.question: How do I explicitly grant support staff permission to access my files or account?
qa_pairs.answer: If you want us to access, copy or edit your files, or inspect your account and possibly make changes there, you should state so explicitly in your email, or indicate where files are located and give permission. If you have already granted us permission via the CCDB interface, you do not need to do it again.

qa_pairs.question: What is one critical piece of information I must never send in a support request?
qa_pairs.answer: You must never send a password.

qa_pairs.question: What is the maximum attachment size allowed for support emails?
qa_pairs.answer: The maximum attachment size is 40 MB.

qa_pairs.question: What was the subject line used in the support request example?
qa_pairs.answer: The subject line used in the example was 'Job 123456 gives errors on the CC Rorqual cluster'.

qa_pairs.question: What information did Alice provide in her example support request about her job submission?
qa_pairs.answer: Alice stated her name (Alice, user asmith), the time of submission (Today at 10:00 am MST), the job ID (123456), and the cluster (rorqual cluster).

qa_pairs.question: How was the job script included in Alice's example support request?
qa_pairs.answer: The job script was included directly in the email because it was short, and its path (/my/job/script/path) was also provided.
